page_content:
Prerequisite: Permission of ARHU-Communication department. Formerly: SPCH775.

COMM776 Seminar in Interpersonal Communication (3 Credits) Interpersonal communication theory, research, and practice. Formerly: SPCH776.

COMM777 Persuasive Message Strategies (3 Credits)

Examines which persuasive messages are effective to change attitudes and behavior at what times and with what people.

Credit Only Granted for. COMM698P or COMM/777.
